title: Natural Language to SQL Conversion Pipeline
description: Architecture of a pipeline that converts natural language questions to executed SQL using parallel template, LLM, and semantic strategies plus validation and safety layers.
creator: Dan McCreary
author: Dan McCreary
subject: Conversational AI

learningObjectives: Compare template, LLM, and semantic-parsing strategies for converting text to SQL
Explain why validation and sanitization gates run before query execution
Justify the safety constraints that protect a database from unsafe queries
